title: Many More Ores and Crafts
description: Adds 14 ores and recipes (Swords, Armors, Tools and Blocks)
body:
# Many More Ores and Crafts

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3689ba23bfbd4a8cc58202e4cfa300bf22e5274.png) ### Adds 14 ores and recipes (Ores, Items, Tools, Blocks, Armors): 1. Adamantite  1. Amethyst  1. Cobalt  1. Infernal  1. Lead  1. Mythril  1. Obsidian 1. Orichalcum 1. Palladium 1. Platinum  1. Silver  1. Tin 1. Titanium 1. Tungsten ## Generation:
Spoiler - Tin (common)  -> 0-256 - Lead (common) -> 0-112 - Silver (common) -> 0-64 - Tungsten (common) -> 0-64 - Platinum (uncommon) -> 0-64 - Infernal (rare) [Nether] -> 0-112 - Cobalt (uncommon) -> 0-32 - Palladium (uncommon) -> 0-32 - Adamantite (rare) -> (-32)-0 - Orichalcum (rare) -> (-32)-0 - Titanium (epic) -> (-64)-(-32) - Mythril (epic) -> (-64)-(-32)
## Achievements:
Spoiler ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4a8b39ae02cf8a64bb15d026e78dd4a1b12a996.png)
## Mods per ore: - [Tin Ores and Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/tin-ores-and-crafts) - [Silver Ores and Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/silver-ores-and-crafts) - [Lead Ores and Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/lead-ore-and-crafts) - [Titanium Ores and Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/titanium-ores-and-crafts) - [Mythril Ores and Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythril-ores-and-crafts) ## Languages: - English (en_us) - Spanish (es_us, es_es, es_mx, es_ec, es_ve, es_uy) - Portuguese (pt_br, pt_pt) **[only versions 1.21.1, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5]** - Chinese (zh_cn) **[only versions 1.21.1, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5]** - Russian (ru_ru) **[only versions 1.21.1, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5]** - Italian (it_it) **[only versions 1.20.1, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5]** - French (fr_fr) **[only versions 1.20.1, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5]** _Translated by AI (pt_br, pt_pt, zh_cn, ru_ru, fr_fr)_ ## _This mod uses tags compatible with other mods in versions 1.21.x_
